personalization.summaryNote: Strong quarter — organic and email carried growth while paid held flat; the fix for Q3 is getting paid efficiency back and shipping the loyalty program.
personalization.winsLines:
Beat the revenue target by 14% ($1.42M vs $1.25M plan)
Organic sessions up 22% after the site-speed and content push
Email became the #2 channel — abandoned-cart flow alone drove $186K
Returns rate dropped from 9.1% to 6.4% with the new sizing guide
personalization.watchoutsLines:
Paid CAC crept up 8% as June auction pressure spiked
Mobile checkout conversion still trails desktop by 1.9 points
personalization.kpiLines:
Revenue | $1.42M | +14%
Organic sessions | 128,400 | +22%
Email revenue | $186K | +31%
Repeat purchase rate | 34% | +3pt
Conversion rate | 3.1% | +0.4pt
Avg. order value | $94 | -2%
personalization.deliveredLines:
Rebuilt the product pages — 40% faster load, new sizing guide
Launched the abandoned-cart and win-back email flows
Shipped 9 SEO articles targeting high-intent category terms
Migrated paid social to the new catalog + dynamic ads
Stood up weekly performance dashboards for your team
personalization.inFlightLines:
Loyalty & referral program — design done, build underway
Mobile checkout redesign — in usability testing
Influencer seeding pilot for the fall collection
personalization.planLines:
Ship the loyalty program and drive first-order-to-repeat rate
Rebuild mobile checkout to close the 1.9-point conversion gap
Scale paid search into two new metros with tightened CAC caps
personalization.recommendationNote: Momentum is on organic and email — we'd double down there while we repair paid efficiency. The loyalty program is the single biggest lever on repeat revenue heading into the holiday season.
personalization.upsellLine: Add a CRO sprint program — from $4,500/mo
